description:
Operating Area: Adriatic Sea, Croatia, Montenegro

Fully customized Benetti Classic 115'(35m) TO je TO is in impeccable condition making her an ideal charter option. She had her extensive refit in 2012, 2020 a nd l ast i n April 2022. The yacht's sophisticated exterior design and engineering are the work of Benetti, and her luxurious and elegant interior was designed by Zuretti, Mauro Zanon. This classic luxury 3 decks yacht interior has been designed to comfortably accommodate up to 8 guests in 4 en-suite cabins where attention is put into details. She can carry up to 6 crew onboard in 4 cabins to ensure a relaxed luxury yacht experience. There is amazing and very comfortable sunbathing and observation area in which you can relax and enjoy your moments with your family, friends. TO JE TO is a prime yacht for complete enjoyment and experience.

toys.label: Nautibuoy Sport 675 inflatable platform (Sport Series TEAK 675, dimensions 4.5m x l.5m)
Spinera Let's Go 3 (dimensions: L178x W211 x H74 cm)

crew.name: Boris Rodin
crew.bio:
Croatian

Boris has accumulated over two decades of experience working at sea. His maritime journey began in his youth, influenced by his father who was both a sailor and a fisherman. Over time, Boris transitioned to working on private yachts, specializing in the luxury charter business. His expertise spans various aspects of yacht operations, including transfers, assistance during and after sailing trips, as well as maintenance under short-term contracts across popular Mediterranean destinations such as Croatia, Italy, Monaco, France, and Greece. He has served as both Master and Assistant on a diverse range of vessels. Boris thrives in an international setting, excelling in catering to clients and collaborating with crew members from around the globe. He brings a wealth of experience, a passion for the sea, and a commitment to excellence to his role as a captain, ensuring that every voyage is safe, smooth, and memorable for all aboard.

crew.name: Petar Mudnic
crew.bio:
Croatian

After graduating in Maritime high school, Petar continued with his education and obtained all necessary certificates. He started working in yacht charter as skipper in 2017 and since then, he has worked on a plenty of different sized yachts both sailing and motor, on a yacht maintenance, managing water yacht sports equipment and skipper training classes. In 2021, he served as a deckhand on MY TO JE TO, and since 2022, he has held the position of First Officer on TO JE TO (with a one-season break). His enthusiasm is contagious, and it is easy to see why guests love having him onboard. Petar is extremely motivated and will help out wherever he is needed, what makes him a valuable crew member.

crew.name: Neven Aljinovic
crew.bio:
Croatian

Neven has 19 years of experience as a chef with a specialization in Mediterranean and intercontinental cuisine. High-ranked member of Chefs Club Croatia. Neven was working as a Chef in different Croatian restaurants and 5-star hotels. Besides restaurants on the shore, he has worked on yachts for the last 5 years and has fallen in love with this type of service. He is highly motivated and organized, always in a positive mood. Neven is fluent in English.

crew.name: Stipe Vrdoljak
crew.bio:
Croatian

Stipe has extensive experience in the maintenance of sailboats and catamarans, having worked from July 2021 to January 2025 in Kaštela, Croatia. His responsibilities included the installation of various devices as well as maneuvering of different vessels. Stipe is enthusiastic, self-motivated, reliable, responsible, water friendly and hardworking individual, keen on perfecting his knowledge onboard TO JE TO.

crew.name: Filipa Perisin
crew.bio:
Croatian

Filipa has been actively involved in the yachting industry since 2022, gaining valuable experience on both motor and luxury sailing yachts. She has developed a strong understanding of yacht operations and guest services, ensuring a memorable experience for all guests on board. With her friendly demeanor and extensive knowledge, she is dedicated to providing exceptional service in the yachting environment.
